sections.paragraph:
Original: פּוּח

Transliteration: pûach

Phonetic: poo'akh

BDB Definition:

  1. to breathe, blow
    1. (Qal) to breathe
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to cause to exhale or breathe
      2. to puff, snort
      3. to excite, inflame
      4. to puff, pant for it
      5. to breathe out, utter
      6. to blow, blast

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1741

Part(s) of speech: Verb
